---
title: "Asian Cucumber Slices"
author: "Chris Kornaros"
date: 2026-03-06
categories: ["Pickling and Fermenting"]
---

**Ingredients:**

2 long English cucumbers

1/2 cup rice vinegar

3 tbsp sugar

pinch crushed red pepper

salt to taste

**Instructions:**

1\. Thinly slice cucumbers and place in a small bowl. Lightly salt to
taste and stir.

2\. Dissolve sugar in vinegar. Add red pepper and pour onto cucumbers.
Stir well.

3\. Let marinate, stirring occasionally for at least 3-4 hours.

**Notes:**

-   One of the 8oz jars can hold about a third of an english cucumber
    with about ⅓ of the brine

-   

**Source:**
[[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8nil1HkT0ZA&ab_channel=FloLum]{.underline}](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8nil1HkT0ZA&ab_channel=FloLum)
